0.text: Panacinar emphysema in the basal segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Panacinar emphysema in the apical segment of the left upper lobe

2.text: Bullae at the left lung apex

3.text: Bullae in the left lower lingular segment

4.text: Infected bulla with air-fluid level, 9.7x5 cm, stable in the basal segment of the right lower lobe

6.text: Right pleural effusion measuring 10 mm in depth

7.text: Left pleural effusion measuring 15 mm in depth

8.text: Segmental and subsegmental tubular bronchiectasis with peribronchial thickening in both lungs
